markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Scope a new interactive content hub for Relay Financial.](https://fathom.video/share/6foKapLn7KZSDyVbheD1syutPcsfxYfL?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Project Goal:** Build a dynamic content hub for the home services vertical, moving beyond static articles to capture high-intent AEO/SEO traffic and convert it to leads.](https://fathom.video/share/6foKapLn7KZSDyVbheD1syutPcsfxYfL?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [**Strategic Decision:** Integrate the hub into the existing Contentful blog via a subfolder. This avoids SEO issues with a new subdomain and aligns with a Q2 brand campaign targeting the same audience.](https://fathom.video/share/6foKapLn7KZSDyVbheD1syutPcsfxYfL?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [**Key Features:** The hub will feature interactive elements (quizzes, calculators) and multimedia (podcasts, custom research) to create a "delightful" experience.](https://fathom.video/share/6foKapLn7KZSDyVbheD1syutPcsfxYfL?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [**Partnership Scope:** Relay needs a partner for end-to-end delivery (strategy, design, dev, motion graphics) to supplement its small internal team and meet an ambitious Q1 launch target.](https://fathom.video/share/6foKapLn7KZSDyVbheD1syutPcsfxYfL?tab=summary&timestamp=1099.0)

## Topics

### Project Goal & Strategy

  - [**Objective:** Create a niche content hub for the home services vertical (e.g., plumbers, roofers) to capture high-intent AEO/SEO traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/6foKapLn7KZSDyVbheD1syutPcsfxYfL?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Capitalize on the high conversion rates of AI-referred traffic by providing an engaging destination that is more effective than a standard blog post.](https://fathom.video/share/6foKapLn7KZSDyVbheD1syutPcsfxYfL?tab=summary&timestamp=993.0)
  - [**V1 Scope:** Focus on qualified lead capture. The nurture funnel can be built later.](https://fathom.video/share/6foKapLn7KZSDyVbheD1syutPcsfxYfL?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)

### Technical & Platform Approach

  - [**Platform:** Integrate the hub into the existing Contentful blog using a subfolder.](https://fathom.video/share/6foKapLn7KZSDyVbheD1syutPcsfxYfL?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This approach is preferred over a new subdomain to avoid SEO penalties and keep the content within the core Relay web ecosystem.](https://fathom.video/share/6foKapLn7KZSDyVbheD1syutPcsfxYfL?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
  - [**Development:** Relay's two in-house devs prefer custom builds over third-party tools for interactive elements.](https://fathom.video/share/6foKapLn7KZSDyVbheD1syutPcsfxYfL?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)

### Content & Features

  - [**Content Focus:** Deep-dive into specific home services niches, moving beyond general topics.](https://fathom.video/share/6foKapLn7KZSDyVbheD1syutPcsfxYfL?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
  - [**Interactive Elements:**](https://fathom.video/share/6foKapLn7KZSDyVbheD1syutPcsfxYfL?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
      - [**Quizzes:** To increase engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/6foKapLn7KZSDyVbheD1syutPcsfxYfL?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
      - [**Calculators:** To provide value.](https://fathom.video/share/6foKapLn7KZSDyVbheD1syutPcsfxYfL?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
          - [**Constraint:** Must use "imaginary numbers" due to compliance rules against offering fake predictions with real data.](https://fathom.video/share/6foKapLn7KZSDyVbheD1syutPcsfxYfL?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
  - [**Multimedia:**](https://fathom.video/share/6foKapLn7KZSDyVbheD1syutPcsfxYfL?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
      - [**Original Research:** A smaller, niche survey for home services to supplement the annual "Cash Flow Compass" report.](https://fathom.video/share/6foKapLn7KZSDyVbheD1syutPcsfxYfL?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
      - [**Podcast Integration:** Feature relevant episodes, like the one with Brian Scudamore.](https://fathom.video/share/6foKapLn7KZSDyVbheD1syutPcsfxYfL?tab=summary&timestamp=791.0)
  - [**Visuals:** Primary Relay branding, not a sub-brand. The project may include a blog facelift to improve the overall brand experience.](https://fathom.video/share/6foKapLn7KZSDyVbheD1syutPcsfxYfL?tab=summary&timestamp=834.0)

### Partnership & Timeline

  - [**Relay Team:** Bethany Cantor, Dave White, Carolyn (Lead Brand Designer), Katie, and a new content marketing hire. Nick (VP of Marketing) and Finance will be involved for approvals.](https://fathom.video/share/6foKapLn7KZSDyVbheD1syutPcsfxYfL?tab=summary&timestamp=1453.0)
  - [**Partnership Rationale:** Relay needs a partner for end-to-end delivery (strategy, design, dev, motion graphics) to supplement its small internal team and meet an ambitious timeline.](https://fathom.video/share/6foKapLn7KZSDyVbheD1syutPcsfxYfL?tab=summary&timestamp=1099.0)
  - [**Timeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/6foKapLn7KZSDyVbheD1syutPcsfxYfL?tab=summary&timestamp=1171.0)
      - [**Proposal:** Required within the next month for 2025 budget planning.](https://fathom.video/share/6foKapLn7KZSDyVbheD1syutPcsfxYfL?tab=summary&timestamp=1171.0)
      - [**Launch Target:** End of Q1 2025.](https://fathom.video/share/6foKapLn7KZSDyVbheD1syutPcsfxYfL?tab=summary&timestamp=1171.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Align the hub's launch with a major Q2 brand campaign targeting the home services audience.](https://fathom.video/share/6foKapLn7KZSDyVbheD1syutPcsfxYfL?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX Labs:**](https://fathom.video/share/6foKapLn7KZSDyVbheD1syutPcsfxYfL?tab=summary&timestamp=1600.0)
      - [Scope the project, including development and motion graphics needs.](https://fathom.video/share/6foKapLn7KZSDyVbheD1syutPcsfxYfL?tab=summary&timestamp=1501.0)
      - [Deliver a proposal after Thanksgiving to support Relay's budget planning.](https://fathom.video/share/6foKapLn7KZSDyVbheD1syutPcsfxYfL?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)
